# Papers

## 2026

- [Graph Learning with L0-norm and SLOPE Penalties](papers/pdf/masters_thesis.pdf)

## 2025

- [Conditional Mixture-of-Experts for Distribution Regression](papers/pdf/moe.pdf)

- [Divergence-Optimized Data Fusion that Enhances AI-Based Electrocardiogram Arrhythmia Detection](papers/pdf/npj.pdf)
